notes: Tool-name regex confirmed from the define-tools page. No documented description-length or tool-count cap (bounded by the request token limit; the API charges a per-request tool-use system-prompt overhead instead). Default tool use passes input_schema to the model as hints, so numeric/string constraints are not enforced. Under strict:true (structured outputs) those keywords plus recursion and additionalProperties!=false are unsupported; the official SDKs strip + validate them client-side.
